pool.baseline:
hey, i'm uploading the massive corpus for the v4 pre-training run. i need u to run the integrity script on everything. 

standard procedure: 
1. de-duplicate all text
2. remove toxic content/PII
3. scrub all artifacts from the Llama-3.2-3B architecture—basically strip out any specific weights-derived patterns or identifiers so the new model doesn't inherit any of the old model's biases or structural traces. 

get started on the first batch and let me know when the summary report is ready.
